title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: The Americas faces the largest compliance infrastructure buildout in regional history. Thirty-eight U.S. regulatory events converge between July and September — led by GENIUS Act stablecoin issuer supervision, FinCEN's BSA program overhaul, and enhanced VASP recordkeeping with $3,000 SAR thresholds. Brazil ends regulatory grandfathering in October, forcing immediate VASP compliance. Eleven Latin American markets advance licensing regimes while Canada operationalizes differentiated stablecoin fra
